title: A US Journalist Just Pleaded Guilty to Being a Spy for China
script: An American journalist just pleaded guilty in federal court to secretly working as an agent for China for over 6 years. Prosecutors say he passed insider U.S. policy briefings, names of officials, and the texts of unpublished editorials directly to a Beijing intelligence handler. He was paid 89,000 dollars in cash and travel. The FBI caught him after a 3-year surveillance operation. He faces up to 10 years. The outlet he wrote for had no idea.
